qa_pairs.question: How do I add a new individual member to a Niagara Resource Allocation Project (RAP)?
qa_pairs.answer: To add a new member to a Niagara RAP, go to 'Add Members' and enter the user's CCRI. Once successfully added, the new member's entry will be highlighted in yellow.

qa_pairs.question: Can I add a new Principal Investigator (PI) along with their sponsored users or co-PIs to a Niagara RAP all at once?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, if you add a new PI as a member to a Niagara RAP, you can add any of their sponsored users or co-PIs simultaneously. Go to 'Add Members' and click the 'In bulk' link, which will take you to a new page where you can add multiple associated roles at once.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I can't find a specific user in the 'In bulk' list when adding members to a Niagara RAP?
qa_pairs.answer: If you do not see the name of the user you are looking for in the 'In bulk' list, click 'Cancel' to go back to the RAP membership page, and then return to step 3 to add them individually using their CCRI.
